en: There are five people in our family.

ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: izua ti kama/ama, ti kina/ina tiaken, katua ku kaka a tjavulung a uqaljay katua tjavulung a vavayan, namatevetevelj amen a tacekeljan.
ch: 有爸爸、媽媽和我、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: qacaqaca ti kama, kisacu a ku kama.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: riljariljay ti kina, kuisang a ku kina.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: qivuyivu ti kama tua penaiyuanan i tjumaq tjanuamen.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the paiwan language with us at home.

ab: nu kaljapulavayan cemikel amen a sema qinaljan.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: vaik aken katua mareka ku kaka a tjavavulungan a djemekep tua kiav.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.

ab: tjengelay aken aravac tua mareka ku sikatacemekeljan.
en: I like our family very much.
